meaning: adj.未被改变的,不变的,照旧的
examples: Indeed, unaltered shells of marine invertebrates are known from deposits over 100 million years old.
This practice has remained unaltered for centuries.
The rest of the apartment had fortunately remained unaltered since that time.
Being a Nexus device, the Nexus 7 runs an unaltered version of Android 4.1 Jelly Bean.
But the basic offering remains largely unaltered despite protestations to the contrary by business school leaders.
